name: shelly
description: The Shelly plugin: Shelly is the shell your coding agents — Claude or Codex — work inside. The working agent authors self-contained HTML artifacts inline, in full context, when a turn earns one; a Stop-hook backstop surfaces one if a substantive turn ends with nothing written. Bespoke HTML tools and health checks included.

plugins.name: shelly
plugins.description: The working agent authors self-contained HTML artifacts inline when a turn earns one; a Stop-hook backstop reminds it once if a substantive turn ends with nothing written.
